title: cyclosorus dichrotrichus
intro: Cyclosorus dichrotrichus, also known as the dichotomous fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, including parts of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The dichotomous fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Cyclosorus dichrotrichus include teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system.
